title: Structured Observability, Health, Profiling, Capacity, and Incidents · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs structured observability, health, profiling, capacity, and incidents from bounded request and server evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the low-cardinality service evidence and incident dashboard. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for low-cardinality service evidence and incident dashboard after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Emit one structured request completion record with request and trace IDs, method, route pattern, status, duration, bytes, trusted peer class, and redaction.
Measure duration distributions, active requests, request and response bytes, status classes, cancellations, rejects, saturation, and dependencies with bounded attributes.
Apply current OpenTelemetry server span kind, low-cardinality route, method, status, error.type, network and server attributes, propagation, sampling, and 4xx semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Separate evidence from confidence · Review Profile Capacity Incident
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 4278 in a privacy-sensitive records API using conditional requests. Build deterministic Go evidence to use bounded route telemetry and distinguish server errors from readiness capacity; then make specification and runtime disagree on one nullable field and block release. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Use benchmarks, pprof in a protected plane, traces, saturation, tail latency, allocation, contention, load shape, and changed-fault evidence for capacity and incidents.

Inspect the Profile Capacity Incident trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
